slides.label: bound
slides.sub:
F is a lower bound
on log evidence.

slides.label: razor
slides.headline:
A simpler model
that fits
almost as well
slides.sub:
Because it didn't
have to stretch as far.

slides.label: builtin
slides.headline:
Occam's razor
built into the
equation.
slides.sub:
No separate penalty term.
No BIC. No AIC.
